extName.description: Extension name shown in browser UI.

extDescription.message: Highlights unique tracks while you browse music search pages. It marks previously seen tracks, remixes, and duplicates so you can quickly focus on new results.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in browser UI.

popupPrevious.description: Label for tracks from previous pages.

popupDbScope.description: Popup current folder storage counter label.

scopeEdit.description: Edit folder button title and accessible label.

scopeValueTitle.message:
Current folder: the group of tracks you are browsing now.
Duplicates are checked against this tab and saved tracks in this folder.
If one artist is split across different folders on different sites, rename the folder
scopeValueTitle.description: Tooltip for the current folder value.

scopeSave.description: Save folder button title and accessible label.

scopeUseAuto.message: Reset to the automatically recognized folder
scopeUseAuto.description: Reset manual folder button title and accessible label.

manualScopeTitle.message: Manual folder for this URL section

enableTitle.message: Enable track highlighting on the current tab

debugTitle.message:
Show diagnostic frames and print extra logs.
Usually not needed

previousTitle.message: Records from other pages currently used to filter duplicates: including variants / unique tracks only

newTitle.message: Unique tracks on the current page

variantTitle.message: Other versions of already seen tracks: remix, extended, radio edit, and similar

duplicateTitle.message: Exact or near-exact repeats of already seen tracks

dbTotalTitle.message: Total saved tracks in the browser extension local storage
dbTotalTitle.description: Tooltip for the total DB counter.

dbScopeTitle.message: Saved tracks in the browser extension local storage for the current folder
dbScopeTitle.description: Tooltip for the current folder DB counter.

sourceSelectorTitle.message:
Sites with tracks from the current folder.
Blue is the current page.
Green pages participate in duplicate filtering.
You can select/unselect pages to participate

errorScopeEmpty.description: Error shown when a manual scope value is empty.

errorHttpOnly.message: The extension works only on http(s) pages.
errorHttpOnly.description: Error shown for unsupported browser URLs.

errorNoActiveTab.description: Popup error when no active tab exists.

errorNoTabUrl.description: Popup error when active tab has no URL.

errorCouldNotLoadTabState.description: Popup error when tab state cannot be read.

errorFailedUpdateDebug.description: Popup error when debug mode cannot be changed.

errorScopeEditingUnavailable.description: Popup error when manual scope editing API is unavailable.

errorTabNotEnabled.description: Error shown when an action requires an enabled tab.

errorScriptingUnavailable.description: Error shown when script injection is unavailable.

errorCouldNotReprocessPage.description: Error prefix shown when page reprocessing fails.

errorCouldNotStartContentScript.description: Error prefix shown when content script injection fails.

errorFailedProcessTracks.description: Content error when background rejects track processing.

errorNoTrackRows.message: No track rows detected. Enable Debug mode and check the page console for MusicBrowserExt logs.
errorNoTrackRows.description: Content error when no tracks are detected.

errorNoProcessingSummary.description: Content error when background returns no classification summary.

errorScopeNotDetected.message: Scope is not detected on this page.
errorScopeNotDetected.description: Error shown when artist/search scope cannot be detected.

actionTitleDefault.description: Toolbar action title when extension is disabled.

actionTitleEnabled.description: Toolbar action title when extension is enabled for a tab.
